title: Remembrance Day
label: 2025 Event
cardDescription: Memorial ceremony, guard duty, and remembrance across day and evening hours. 16 photos.
heroDescription: Memorial ceremony, guard duty, and remembrance captured across day and evening hours.
galleryDescription: Cadet presence, ceremonial posture, wreaths, and remembrance-focused moments from the annual event.
